headline: Ofgem publishes "minded-to" (provisional) decisions for LDES Cap & Floor Window 1
summary: Ofgem's provisional Window 1 cap & floor decisions for UK long-duration storage, opened for consultation to Aug 7, 2026 before final binding awards. "Minded-to" = proposed, not yet awarded. Frontier Power Ltd. (UK) entered Window 1 with ~16 Eos-zinc / Invinity-flow projects (~2.6 GW / 20 GWh); their status on the provisional list should be confirmed against Ofgem's project tables.

headline: Frontier Power USA Engages KKR Capital Markets to Support Scaled Deployment of Long-Duration Energy Storage
summary: FPUSA engaged KKR Capital Markets as structuring agent for construction finance, tax equity and long-term project finance across its 2 GWh pipeline — de-risking FPUSA's capitalisation alongside Cerberus' $100M equity anchor and the Ariel Green TPI wrap; complements Eos' ~$150M rights-offering contribution.
